user.title: Connection Observer – Protocols
user.description: Select which connection protocols to monitor. Only protocols already configured in your Home Assistant instance are shown.

notifications.title: Connection Observer – Notifications
notifications.description: Choose how and when to receive alerts. Immediate and summary modes can both be active simultaneously.

test.title: Connection Observer – Test
test.description: Click **Submit** to send a test notification to your selected service(s). Uncheck the box below to skip this step.

advanced.title: Connection Observer – Advanced
advanced.description: All fields are optional. Set to 0 to disable a feature.

data.alert_delay: Alert delay – minutes offline before an event is created (0 = instant)
data.cooldown: Cooldown between immediate notifications per device (0 = no limit)
data.min_offline_duration: Minimum offline duration to appear in summary (0 = all events)

error.test_failed: Test notification failed. Check that the notification service is set up correctly, then try again. Uncheck the box to skip the test and proceed anyway.

abort.no_protocols: No supported protocols found. Please configure Zigbee, Z-Wave, Bluetooth, or another supported integration first.

data.cooldown: Cooldown between notifications per device (minutes, 0 = no limit)
data.min_offline_duration: Minimum offline duration for summary (minutes, 0 = all events)
data.repairs_threshold: HA Repairs issue after N hours offline (0 = disabled)
data.tmpl_sum_resolved: Template: summary line – resolved event (empty = default)
data.tmpl_sum_ongoing: Template: summary line – ongoing offline (empty = default)

device_offline.title: Device offline: {device_name}
device_offline.description:
**{device_name}** ({protocol}) has been offline since **{since}**.

Check the device and its connection. Once it reconnects, Connection Observer will automatically resolve this issue.
